description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Off-white dial, has glow-in-the-dark inlays on the hour and minute handsFeatures: A screw to reset the time, two sub-dials for month and 24-hour time, a date aperture and two push-buttons to adjust the sub-dialsStrap style: Black textured leather strap, secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature GIORDANO caseInternational warranty: 2 yearsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
